languages.text: "Выберите кого-то из тех, кто не хотел покидать Зарков — уверен{mf||а}, такой человек лучше всего позаботится о своем доме".
"Choose someone who did not wish to leave Zarkov — such a person would take care of their home better than anyone else, I am sure."
languages.original_text: "Выберите кого-то из тех, кто не хотел покидать Зарков — уверен{mf||а}, такой человек лучше всего позаботится о своем доме".

traits.locale_text: "Choose someone who did not wish to leave Zarkov — such a person would take care of their home better than anyone else, I am sure."
"Choose someone who did not wish to leave Zarkov — such a person would take care of their home better than anyone else, I am sure."
"Choose someone who did not wish to leave Zarkov — such a person would take care of their home better than anyone else, I am sure."

languages.text: 「ザルコフを離れたくはない人を選べ。そうした人は、誰よりも自分の家を大切にしているだろう」
languages.original_text: "Choose someone who did not wish to leave Zarkov — such a person would take care of their home better than anyone else, I am sure."

traits.locale_text: 「ザルコフを離れたくはない人を選べ。そうした人は、誰よりも自分の家を大切にしているだろう。」

languages.text: « Choisissez quelqu'un qui ne voulait pas quitter Zarkov. Une telle personne s'occupera de sa planète mieux que n'importe qui d'autre, à n'en pas douter. »
languages.original_text: "Choose someone who did not wish to leave Zarkov — such a person would take care of their home better than anyone else, I am sure."

traits.locale_text: « Choisissez quelqu'un qui ne voulait pas quitter Zarkov. Une telle personne s'occupera de sa planète mieux que n'importe qui d'autre, à n'en pas douter. »

languages.text: "Zarkov'u terk etmek istemeyen birini seçin. Böyle birinin kendi evine herkesten daha iyi bakacağına eminim."
languages.original_text: "Choose someone who did not wish to leave Zarkov — such a person would take care of their home better than anyone else, I am sure."

traits.locale_text: "Zarkov'u terk etmek istemeyen birini seçin. Böyle birinin kendi evine herkesten daha iyi bakacağına eminim."

languages.text: "Wählt jemanden, der Zarkov nicht verlassen wollte ... ich bin mir sicher, eine solche Person würde sich besser als jeder andere um ihre Heimat kümmern."
languages.original_text: "Choose someone who did not wish to leave Zarkov — such a person would take care of their home better than anyone else, I am sure."

traits.locale_text: "Wählt jemanden, der Zarkov nicht verlassen wollte ... ich bin mir sicher, eine solche Person würde sich besser als jeder andere um ihre Heimat kümmern."

languages.text: «Elijan a alguien que no quiera abandonar Zarkov. Una persona así cuidará mejor de su hogar que ningún otro, sin duda».
languages.original_text: "Choose someone who did not wish to leave Zarkov — such a person would take care of their home better than anyone else, I am sure."

traits.locale_text: «Elijan a alguien que no quiera abandonar Zarkov. Una persona así cuidará mejor de su hogar que ningún otro, sin duda».

languages.text: “选一个不愿离开扎尔科夫的人——我相信，这样的人在守护他们自己的家园时，会比任何人都更尽心。”
languages.original_text: "Choose someone who did not wish to leave Zarkov — such a person would take care of their home better than anyone else, I am sure."

traits.locale_text: “选一个不愿离开扎尔科夫的人——我相信，这样的人在守护他们自己的家园时，会比任何人都更尽心。”
